bug.description: signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch leading to incorrect branch

prompt:
There is a signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch leading to incorrect branch downstream of function config_sched_ctrlSIB1 in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB/config.c:780.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
